inlineRules.name: Void Shields 6
inlineRules.shortDesc: This model has 6 Void Shields.
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model has 6 Void Shields.

inlineRules.name: Commanding Presence
inlineRules.shortDesc: Orders from this model have a 48" radius. All units testing on Orders may use this model's Ld.
inlineRules.fullDesc: Orders from this model have a 48" radius. All units testing on Orders cast from this model may use this model's Ld in place of their own.

inlineRules.name: In the Shadow of the Imperium
inlineRules.shortDesc: 24" True Aura: all enemy models suffer Ld−2.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 24" True Aura: all enemy models suffer Ld–2.

inlineRules.name: Destructive Path
inlineRules.shortDesc: Destroys all Terrain and Fortifications it moves over. May only pivot up to current M value.
inlineRules.fullDesc: All Terrain is destroyed by this model moving over it, including Titanic Terrain. Any Fortifications touched by this model are Destroyed. This model may only pivot up to its current M value when turning. This model displaces all models when it moves including Titanic ones.

choices.label: 2 Heavy Bolters
2 Lascannons
6 Heavy Plasma Cannons
6 Sets of 2 Linked Heavy Plasma Cannons
20 Lascannons
4 Sets of 4 Linked Autocannons

inlineRules.name: Void Shields 4
inlineRules.shortDesc: This model has 4 Void Shields.
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model has 4 Void Shields.

inlineRules.name: Inspiring Presence
inlineRules.shortDesc: Orders from this model have a 24" radius. All units testing on Orders may use this model's Ld.
inlineRules.fullDesc: Orders from this model have a 24" radius. All units testing on Orders cast from this model may use this model's Ld in place of their own.

inlineRules.name: Create Panic
inlineRules.shortDesc: Displaces all models when it moves. Immobile units prevent it from moving there.
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model displaces all models when it moves, place them up to 1" away. Immobile units prevent this model from moving there.

inlineRules.name: Immense Bulk
inlineRules.shortDesc: May only Pivot up to its current M value.
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model may only Pivot up to its current M value. It may still move as normal.

choices.label: Battle Cannon
Mega Battle Cannon and Autocannon

options.label: 2 Sets of 2 Linked Hunter Killer Missile Racks
Add 8 Sets of 2 Linked Heavy Bolters (Sponson)

inlineRules.name: 13th Penal Legion
inlineRules.shortDesc: These models cannot grant or receive Auras or Orders to/from any other unit. Not affected by Regiment rules.
inlineRules.fullDesc: These models cannot grant or receive Auras or Orders to or from any other unit. They are not affected by any Regiment Rules.

inlineRules.name: Savage
inlineRules.shortDesc: May declare Charges after Advancing or Disembarking.
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model and his unit may declare Charges after Advancing or Disembarking.

inlineRules.name: Jerry Rigger
inlineRules.shortDesc: Repair d3 Wounds; on 4+ restore a Disabled result.
inlineRules.fullDesc: Repair d3 Wounds, on a 4+ restore a Weapon Disabled, Crew Stun, Immobilize, or Weapon Destroyed Result.

inlineRules.name: Demolition Expert
inlineRules.shortDesc: Blast Templates never scatter and may reroll 1s To Wound.
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model and his unit's Blast Templates never Scatter and may reroll 1s To Wound.

inlineRules.name: Rocket Loader
inlineRules.shortDesc: Rocket Girl may fire 1 additional time each time she is nominated to shoot.
inlineRules.fullDesc: Rocket Girl may fire 1 additional time each time she is nominated to shoot.

inlineRules.name: Hijacker
inlineRules.shortDesc: When Assaulting a Vehicle with Transport 10+, on a 5+ take control of it and immediately Embark.
inlineRules.fullDesc: When Assaulting a Vehicle, roll a d6 before attacking. On a 5+, take control of the target Vehicle so long as it has Transport 10+ and immediately Embark regardless of Transport size. Use BS3+ for this Vehicle.

inlineRules.name: Last Chance
inlineRules.shortDesc: 3+ Feel No Pain when taking Wounds on behalf of the Squad willingly.
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model gains a 3+ Feel No Pain when taking Wounds on behalf of the Squad willingly.

inlineRules.name: Suppressive Fire
inlineRules.shortDesc: Ranged attacks by Ox gain Grav.
inlineRules.fullDesc: Ranged attacks by Ox gain Grav.

inlineRules.name: Tank Buster
inlineRules.shortDesc: Gains Armourbane when using a Missile Launcher.
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model gains Armourbane when using a Missile Launcher.

inlineRules.name: Deadeye
inlineRules.shortDesc: Models taking Pinning Tests from this model take it at Ld−3.
inlineRules.fullDesc: Models taking Pinning Tests inflicted by this model take the test at Ld–3.

inlineRules.name: Stealth Attack
inlineRules.shortDesc: This model and his unit gain Furious Charge and Shock Assault.
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model and his unit gain Furious Charge and Shock Assault.

inlineRules.name: Way of the Warrior
inlineRules.shortDesc: May change Weapon # to Pistol # and Overwatch at BS#+. No model may fire more than 2 weapons as Pistols.
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model and her unit may change their Weapon # to Pistol # and Overwatch at their BS#+ instead of the usual Overwatch #+. No model may fire more than 2 weapons as Pistols each (and removes the normal Grenade restrictions).

inlineRules.name: Heavy Gate
inlineRules.shortDesc: In your Command Phase, declare if the Gate is Open or Closed. Models may not move through a Closed Gate.
inlineRules.fullDesc: In your Command Phase you may declare if the Gate is Open or Closed. Models may not move through the Gate when it is Closed. The Gate cannot be Closed if models are Obstructing the Gate.

inlineRules.name: Transport 10
inlineRules.shortDesc: Transport capacity 10. 4 Fire Ports Front, Sides, Rear. Access Rear.
inlineRules.fullDesc: Transport 10. 4 Fire Ports Front, Sides, Rear. Access Rear.

inlineRules.shortDesc: Transport capacity 10. 4 Fire Ports Front, Sides, Rear. Access Rear.
inlineRules.fullDesc: Transport 10. 4 Fire Ports Front, Sides, Rear. Access Rear.

options.label: Additional Gate Section (1 Gate + 2 Gate Towers)
